important: There is a scam website that customers are texting in from (https://heydudestores.com/)
If you notice this, reroute customers to the correct website!
send_to_cs: Don't ESC post-purchase issues, use PPI shortcut
templates: For wrong items received use WMP shortcut
For damaged items received use DMI shortcut
For order status requests use OSR shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: The welcome code is valid for first-time customers only.
➜ Can't be combined with any other discounts or offers, including sale styles
➜  Use cww temp for code issues
The promotional price shown on the Heydude website may not always be guaranteed when cx is redirected to Prime for purchase if the item is out of stock

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS using the "Escalation template"
templates: For 10% off welcome code issues use temp 'Follow up 1', then 'Follow up 2' after confirming the item is excluded from promos
For fridge recommendations use FRR shortcut
For service-related issues/scheduled repair service appointments use SRI shortcut
For cxs looking for replacement parts/accessories from an affiliate Parts Distributor use RPA shortcut
If a cx has an inquiry for finding the serial number/model number of an item:
➜ If it's a TV, use mnt shortcut
➜ If it's another product, use mna shortcut
dos_and_donts: If it's a new conversation and we didn't introduce ourselves in the automated message, start your message with: "This is Jordan at LG."

Where is my package?
Comfrt: When did you place your order, and did you receive tracking info? Make sure to check your spam and promo folders.
I place my order today but the app to track my stuff. Is it working for me?

Comfrt: My apologies. Our processing time takes 1-2 business days, and once shipped, it will take 3-4 business days for domestic orders. You'll receive tracking info via email as soon as it ships. Please check your spam and promo folders as sometimes our emails end up there. Let me know if you have any further questions.
Thx
Comfrt: You're welcome! Have a great day and if you have any questions, feel free to shoot me a text. And in case you missed it, check out our loungewear here too: https://comfrt.attn.tv/abdBZUdkPzyu
What company will my package be delivered

Comfrt: Hey Ethan thanks for reaching back. Samantha here. Happy ot help. I'm sorry but what dou mean by that? Are you asking what's the courier that will fulfill your order? Per checking, it looks like your order is being handled by UPS.
